title: lepidium strictum
intro: Lepidium strictum, also known as Land Cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium strictum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used as a spice to add flavor to salads and other dishes.
